overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked futuristic metropolis. The player navigates neon-drenched streets, crosses intersections with futuristic vehicles, and descends into a dark underground passage beneath holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown commercial street with holographic billboards

events.description: stepping onto the yellow striped crosswalk to cross the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk and crossing the street at the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with headlights on driving down the street toward the intersection

entered.detail: large green neon sign reading 'softs' mounted on a building facade
futuristic skyscrapers with multiple illuminated advertisement screens
rain-slicked street surface reflecting neon lights in various colors
tall pole with illuminated walk signal showing yellow pedestrian symbol

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked cyberpunk street at night, with towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements. The camera walks forward along the sidewalk, passing a pedestrian signal post, and approaches a yellow striped crosswalk. A futuristic vehicle approaches from the left as the player character prepares to cross.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath highway overpass with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: crossing the street and stepping onto the sidewalk under the overpass structure
turning right to follow the sidewalk path alongside the concrete wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the overpass, passing the red graffiti wall and navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person wearing a yellow shirt and camouflage pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large concrete wall featuring prominent red spray-painted graffiti art of a stylized face
elevated highway or monorail track creating a covered ceiling over the sidewalk
black metal pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing buttons

segments.scene_description: After crossing the street, the scene transitions to a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated overpass. The camera walks past a distinctive concrete wall covered in red graffiti art. The lighting becomes darker and more mixed as the player moves under the overpass structure, encountering pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with holographic advertisements and neon ceiling

events.description: entering the covered pedestrian walkway with overhead neon lighting and digital billboards
navigating through a denser crowd of pedestrians in the arcade

agents.ego_description: walking through the busy covered walkway, passing various pedestrians and observing the neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: person in a colorful reflective jacket and pink pants walking ahead of the camera
woman in dark business attire walking past the camera toward the opposite direction

entered.detail: enclosed roof structure with linear neon light strips running along the length
large vertical neon sign with pink text reading 'WET DREAM' depicting a stylized figure
bright billboard advertisement for 'Solo Machtigdog' drink with colorful character art
multiple holographic and digital displays mounted on pillars and walls showing various advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player enters a bustling covered pedestrian arcade illuminated by vibrant neon signs and holographic advertisements. The 'WET DREAM' and 'Solo Machtigdog' billboards dominate the visual field. The walkway is populated with moderate pedestrian traffic moving in various directions, and the reflective tile floor mirrors the colorful overhead lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell descending to underground passage

events.description: turning left and entering the dark concrete stairwell leading underground

agents.ego_description: turning left off the main walkway and walking down the concrete stairs into the dimly lit underpass

entered.detail: descending concrete stairs with metal railings leading down to a lower level
dark narrow tunnel passage with minimal lighting at the bottom of the stairs
sparse blue and yellow emergency lights mounted on the tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player turning left into a narrow concrete stairwell descending into darkness. The vibrant neon of the arcade gives way to dim emergency lighting as the character walks down the stairs into an underground tunnel. The environment becomes increasingly dark and enclosed, with only sparse blue lights illuminating the rough concrete walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked neon metropolis into the oppressive darkness of an underground tunnel. It begins on a wet city sidewalk beneath towering holographic advertisements, moving forward past a pedestrian signal toward a yellow striped crosswalk as a futuristic vehicle approaches. As the camera crosses the street, the environment shifts beneath an elevated overpass where the light dims and the scenery transitions to concrete walls marked by red graffiti. The scene then opens into a bustling pedestrian arcade filled with vibrant neon signs and reflective tile floors, dominated by glowing billboards for Wet Dream and Solo Machtigdog. Finally, the camera turns left and descends a narrow concrete stairwell, leaving the colorful lights behind as it sinks into a dark, enclosed tunnel illuminated only by sparse blue emergency lighting.
